title: carex calcarea
intro: Carex calcarea, also known as calcareous sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, Carex calcarea has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Carex calcarea can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
